examples: Working from the comfort of our homes may be convenient, therefore, but it seems we need the company of others to achieve our finest "eureka" moments.
He appears to have had a Eureka moment.
His eureka moment came when he added a catalyst known as TBAB, short for tetrabutylammonium bromide.
Eureka Park is at The Venetian, Level 3, Lido 3101, Murano 3201-3301, San Polo 3404.
